name: FIRPTA Compliance Screening
description: Adds FIRPTA (Foreign Investment in Real Property Tax Act) screening as an early step in deal-quick-screen. Flags foreign seller indicators and estimates withholding obligations before full underwriting.
rationale: US tax compliance requires FIRPTA analysis for any acquisition involving a foreign seller. This template adds an early screening step to catch FIRPTA obligations before resources are committed to full underwriting.

replacements.replace:
### Step 6: FIRPTA Quick Screen
Check for foreign seller indicators:
- Entity domicile outside US
- Foreign-sounding entity names (verify, do not assume)
- Seller requesting wire to non-US bank
- Prior FIRPTA withholding on title

If any indicator present, flag: **FIRPTA REVIEW REQUIRED**
- Estimated withholding: 15% of purchase price (default) or 10% if buyer certifies will use as residence
- Note: Withholding obligation falls on BUYER. Factor into cash-at-close.

### Step 7: Verdict Logic
